SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces

Interface ReceivingCI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, Remote, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI
All Known Implementing Classes:
BrokerReceptionOutboundPort, ClientInboundPort, ReceivingConnector, StubReceivingInboundPort
public interface ReceivingCI extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI
The component interface ReceivingCI is offered by the publication/subscription system to receive messages.

Description

Invariants 

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-01-20

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    receive message from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.
    void
    receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    receive messages from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.

  • Method Details

    • receive

      void receive(String channel, MessageI message) throws Exception
      receive message from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.

      Contract 

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    message != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel from which messsage is received.
      message - message received by the component.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

    • receive

      void receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages) throws Exception
      receive messages from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.

      Contract 

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    messages != null && messages.size() > 0
 pre    Stream.of(messages).allMatch(m -> m != null)
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel from which messsage is received.
      messages - array of messages received by the component.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
